mitigations.mitigation_name: Enable strict egress filtering and DoS protection on the FortiGate perimeter firewall: enforce per-source ICMP rate-limits / traffic policing, enable anti-spoofing (unicast RPF/ingress filtering), and apply DoS/connection limits so a single internal host cannot generate high-rate ICMP floods to external hosts.

args.command:
config firewall address
edit "compromised-host"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall service custom
edit "ICMP"
set protocol 1
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 1
set name "block-icmp-egress"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "Port1"
set srcaddr "compromised-host"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 1
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set status enable
next
end

config system interface
edit "port2"
set src-check enable
next
end

config firewall DoS-policy
edit 1
set interface "port2"
set srcaddr "compromised-host"
set service "PING"
set status enable
set log enable
set anomaly imap enable
set rule 1
set status enable
config rule
edit 1
set protocol 1
set per-ip 100
set action block
next
end
next
end

failed_mitigation.mitigation_name: Enable port-security, DHCP snooping and dynamic ARP inspection on the internal Cisco switch to prevent MAC/IP spoofing, bind hosts to their access ports, and stop an attacker from impersonating other hosts or evading network controls.

args.command: show running-config | include interface|switchport|port-security|ip dhcp snooping|ip arp inspection

ip dhcp snooping
ip dhcp snooping vlan 1
ip arp inspection vlan 1
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 ip dhcp snooping trust
 ip arp inspection trust
exit
interface range GigabitEthernet0/1 - 6
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 2
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
end
write memory

configure terminal
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 2
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/2
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 2
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/3
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 2
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/4
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 2
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/5
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 2
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/6
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 2
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 exit
end
write memory

configure terminal
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 1
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/2
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 1
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/3
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 1
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/4
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 1
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/5
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 1
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/6
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 1
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 exit
end
